Interface IGeoImageDescription

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to members that control an image description.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("03B73B41-D7DF-4A25-A1C1-82F126F4D2F3")]
public interface IGeoImageDescription

Properties

BSQ

Indicates if output should be generated in BSQ pxiel interleave format.

bool BSQ { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
